TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_dadiw-mabulaw_kakuh_i_Tansuy, title = dadiw-mabulaw_kakuh_i_Tansuy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/dadiw-mabulaw_kakuh_i_Tansuy} }

S.FORM: mabulaw katukuh i Tansuy lacul nu dadiw tina dadiw sa, namudadiw ci Cinmenwang atu Li-Pinghuy , u mamenuay a tademaw. napaaca-mudadiw i Tansuy ku heni. namakayzaay mudadiw tina dadiw sa, singangantu ku heni. Li-Pinghuy (1949 a mihcaan), u mamenuay a mudadiway i Taywan. matineng misaungay tu lima-bali-cin . pulung ci Cinmenwang mapalaw atu mudadiw. 1997 a mihcaan, mudadiw atu patahkal dadiw"mabulaw katukuh Tansuy", sisa singangan tuway. namabelec ci Cinmengwang sa, malalid sa mudadiw katukuh ayza. kapah henay ku uzip niza. 2017 a mihcaan, maala ciniza tu zazan-mipalaway . ci Cinmenwang(1953-2002), u saayaway a ngangan niza ci Wang-Yingtan. nalecuh i Kimen, u singanganay a mudadiway i Taywan. sumamad sa, mudadiw ciniza i Taypak Peitou, mapulung patahkal ci Li-Pinghuy. 1965 a mihcaan, 12 ku mihca ciniza, malitemuh ku bakutang mabetas. mapetek ku lima atu mamenu tuway. namakayzaay sa, caay kakapah ku uzip niza, pauzip tu patudu' tu simbung. 2002 a mihcaan 5 a bulad, natayza ciniza mudadiw i laziw kakitizaan, masiket tu balucu', sinawaltu, katukuh i padekuan sa, mabelec tuway. siuzip 49 a mihca. ngatu cacay uwak , uwak, mapulung kita celip tu epah, busuk la~, busuk la~ musadadiw , masalukyw , mapulung kita, apauzip mabulaw Tansuy mabulah tu kakaydihan , kiptul kya idih , matineng tu ~ciapaay kaku celip tu pah, lihalayay , aka muwangic , u simpi' ku nacilacila' makazateng , kakaydihan, hamin alesen , mabulawtu , muliyaw kaku caay kaku patahtah , caay kakapah ku uzip muawaw tu taw, tayzatu kaku, mudadiw kaku malalum mapawpaw , mulenu , aka kalibud, salahbal , mangadis aca manamuh i labiyi , mapulung kita, salukyw kisu, miulic kaku uwak, uwak, mapulung kita celip tu epah, busuk la~, busuk la~ ngatu tusa uwak, uwak, mapulung kita celip tu epah, busuk la~, busuk la~ musadadiw , masalukyw, mapulung kita, apauzip mabulaw Tansuy mabulah tu kakaydihan, kiptul kya idih, matineng tu ~ciapaay kaku celip tu pah, lihalayay, akamuwangic, u simpi' ku nacilacila' makazateng, kakaydihan, hamin alesen, mabulawtu, muliyaw kaku caay kaku patahtah, caay kakapah ku uzip muawaw tu taw, tayzatu kaku, mudadiw kaku malalum mapawpaw, mulenu, akakalibud, salahbal, mangadis aca manamuh i labiyi, mapulung kita, salukyw kisu, miulic kaku uwak, uwak, mapulung kita celip tu epah, busuk la~, busuk la~
S.PHON: mabur~…ĺaw katukuńß i tansuj r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu dadiw tina dadiw sa, namudadiw ¶i ¶inm…ônwaŇč atu r~…ĺi-piŇčńßuj , u mam…ônuaj a tad…ômaw. napaa ¶a-mudadiw i tansuj ku ńß…ôni. namakajzaaj mudadiw tina dadiw sa, siŇčaŇčantu ku ńß…ôni. r~…ĺi-piŇčńßuj (**** a mińß ¶aan), u mam…ônuaj a mudadiwaj i tajwan. matin…ôŇč misauŇčaj tu r~…ĺima-bar~…ĺi- ¶in . pur~…ĺuŇč ¶i ¶inm…ônwaŇč mapar~…ĺaw atu mudadiw. **** a mińß ¶aan, mudadiw atu patańßkar~…ĺ dadiw"mabur~…ĺaw katukuńß tansuj", sisa siŇčaŇčan tuwaj. namab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ ¶i ¶inm…ôŇčwaŇč sa, mar~…ĺar~…ĺid sa mudadiw katukuńß ajza. kapańß ńß…ônaj ku uzip niza. **** a mińß ¶aan, maar~…ĺa ¶iniza tu zazan-mipar~…ĺawaj . ¶i ¶inm…ônwaŇč(****-****), u saajawaj a ŇčaŇčan niza ¶i waŇč-jiŇčtan. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i kim…ôn, u siŇčaŇčanaj a mudadiwaj i tajwan. sumamad sa, mudadiw ¶iniza i tajpak p…ôitou, mapur~…ĺuŇč patańßkar~…ĺ ¶i r~…ĺi-piŇčńßuj. **** a mińß ¶aan, ** ku mińß ¶a ¶iniza, mar~…ĺit…ômuńß ku bakutaŇč mab…ôtas. map…ôt…ôk ku r~…ĺima atu mam…ônu tuwaj. namakajzaaj sa, ¶aaj kakapańß ku uzip niza, pauzip tu patudu Ē~ ° tu simbuŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad, natajza ¶iniza mudadiw i r~…ĺaziw kakitizaan, masik…ôt tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, sinawar~…ĺtu, katukuńß i pad…ôkuan sa, mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ tuwaj. siuzip ** a mińß ¶a. Ňčatu ¶a ¶aj uwak , uwak, mapur~…ĺuŇč kita ¶…ôr~…ĺip tu …ôpańß, busuk r~…ĺa~, busuk r~…ĺa~ musadadiw , masar~…ĺukjw , mapur~…ĺuŇč kita, apauzip mabur~…ĺaw tansuj mabur~…ĺańß tu kakajdińßan , kiptur~…ĺ kja idińß , matin…ôŇč tu ~ ¶iapaaj kaku ¶…ôr~…ĺip tu pańß, r~…ĺińßar~…ĺajaj , aka muwaŇči ¶ , u simpi Ē~ ° ku na ¶ir~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺa Ē~ ° makazat…ôŇč , kakajdińßan, ńßamin ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn , mabur~…ĺawtu , mur~…ĺijaw kaku ¶aaj kaku patańßtańß , ¶aaj kakapańß ku uzip muawaw tu taw, tajzatu kaku, mudadiw kaku mar~…ĺar~…ĺum mapawpaw , mur~…ĺ…ônu , aka kar~…ĺibud, sar~…ĺańßbar~…ĺ , maŇčadis a ¶a manamuńß i r~…ĺabiji , mapur~…ĺuŇč kita, sar~…ĺukjw kisu, miur~…ĺi ¶ kaku uwak, uwak, mapur~…ĺuŇč kita ¶…ôr~…ĺip tu …ôpańß, busuk r~…ĺa~, busuk r~…ĺa~ Ňčatu tusa uwak, uwak, mapur~…ĺuŇč kita ¶…ôr~…ĺip tu …ôpańß, busuk r~…ĺa~, busuk r~…ĺa~ musadadiw , masar~…ĺukjw, mapur~…ĺuŇč kita, apauzip mabur~…ĺaw tansuj mabur~…ĺańß tu kakajdińßan, kiptur~…ĺ kja idińß, matin…ôŇč tu ~ ¶iapaaj kaku ¶…ôr~…ĺip tu pańß, r~…ĺińßar~…ĺajaj, akamuwaŇči ¶, u simpi Ē~ ° ku na ¶ir~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺa Ē~ ° makazat…ôŇč, kakajdińßan, ńßamin ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn, mabur~…ĺawtu, mur~…ĺijaw kaku ¶aaj kaku patańßtańß, ¶aaj kakapańß ku uzip muawaw tu taw, tajzatu kaku, mudadiw kaku mar~…ĺar~…ĺum mapawpaw, mur~…ĺ…ônu, akakar~…ĺibud, sar~…ĺańßbar~…ĺ, maŇčadis a ¶a manamuńß i r~…ĺabiji, mapur~…ĺuŇč kita, sar~…ĺukjw kisu, miur~…ĺi ¶ kaku uwak, uwak, mapur~…ĺuŇč kita ¶…ôr~…ĺip tu …ôpańß, busuk r~…ĺa~, busuk r~…ĺa~
S.FORM: mabulaw katukuh i Tansuy lacul nu dadiw tina dadiw sa, namudadiw ci Cinmenwang atu Li-Pinghuy , u mamenuay a tademaw. napaaca-mudadiw i Tansuy ku heni. namakayzaay mudadiw tina dadiw sa, singangantu ku heni. Li-Pinghuy (1949 a mihcaan), u mamenuay a mudadiway i Taywan. matineng misaungay tu lima-bali-cin . pulung ci Cinmenwang mapalaw atu mudadiw. 1997 a mihcaan, mudadiw atu patahkal dadiw"mabulaw katukuh Tansuy", sisa singangan tuway. namabelec ci Cinmengwang sa, malalid sa mudadiw katukuh ayza. kapah henay ku uzip niza. 2017 a mihcaan, maala ciniza tu zazan-mipalaway . ci Cinmenwang(1953-2002), u saayaway a ngangan niza ci Wang-Yingtan. nalecuh i Kimen, u singanganay a mudadiway i Taywan. sumamad sa, mudadiw ciniza i Taypak Peitou, mapulung patahkal ci Li-Pinghuy. 1965 a mihcaan, 12 ku mihca masalukyw , mapulung kita, apauzip mabulaw Tansuy mabulah tu kakaydihan , kiptul kya idih , matineng tu ~ciapaay kaku celip tu pah, lihalayay , aka muwangic , u simpi' ku nacilacila' makazateng , kakaydihan, hamin alesen , mabulawtu , muliyaw kaku caay kaku patahtah , caay kakapah ku uzip muawaw tu taw, tayzatu kaku, mudadiw kaku malalum mapawpaw , mulenu , aka kalibud, salahbal , mangadis aca manamuh i labiyi , mapulung kita, salukyw kisu, miulic kaku uwak, uwak, mapulung kita celip tu epah, busuk la~, busuk la~ ngatu tusa uwak, uwak, mapulung kita celip tu epah, busuk la~, busuk la~ musadadiw , masalukyw, mapulung kita, apauzip mabulaw Tansuy mabulah tu kakaydihan, kiptul kya idih, matineng tu ~ciapaay kaku celip tu pah, lihalayay, akamuwangic, u simpi' ku nacilacila' makazateng, kakaydihan, hamin alesen, mabulawtu, muliyaw kaku caay kaku patahtah, caay kakapah ku uzip muawaw tu taw, tayzatu kaku, mudadiw kaku malalum mapawpaw, mulenu, akakalibud, salahbal, mangadis aca manamuh i labiyi, mapulung kita, salukyw kisu, miulic kaku uwak, uwak, mapulung kita celip tu epah, busuk la~, busuk la~
S.PHON: mabur~…ĺaw katukuńß i tansuj r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nu dadiw tina dadiw sa, namudadiw ¶i ¶inm…ônwaŇč atu r~…ĺi-piŇčńßuj , u mam…ônuaj a tad…ômaw. napaa ¶a-mudadiw i tansuj ku ńß…ôni. namakajzaaj mudadiw tina dadiw sa, siŇčaŇčantu ku ńß…ôni. r~…ĺi-piŇčńßuj (**** a mińß ¶aan), u mam…ônuaj a mudadiwaj i tajwan. matin…ôŇč misauŇčaj tu r~…ĺima-bar~…ĺi- ¶in . pur~…ĺuŇč ¶i ¶inm…ônwaŇč mapar~…ĺaw atu mudadiw. **** a mińß ¶aan, mudadiw atu patańßkar~…ĺ dadiw"mabur~…ĺaw katukuńß tansuj", sisa siŇčaŇčan tuwaj. namab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ ¶i ¶inm…ôŇčwaŇč sa, mar~…ĺar~…ĺid sa mudadiw katukuńß ajza. kapańß ńß…ônaj ku uzip niza. **** a mińß ¶aan, maar~…ĺa ¶iniza tu zazan-mipar~…ĺawaj . ¶i ¶inm…ônwaŇč(****-****), u saajawaj a ŇčaŇčan niza ¶i waŇč-jiŇčtan. nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i kim…ôn, u siŇčaŇčanaj a mudadiwaj i tajwan. sumamad sa, mudadiw ¶iniza i tajpak p…ôitou, mapur~…ĺuŇč patańßkar~…ĺ ¶i r~…ĺi-piŇčńßuj. **** a mińß ¶aan, ** ku mińß ¶a ¶iniza, mar~…ĺit…ômuńß ku bakutaŇč mab…ôtas. map…ôt…ôk ku r~…ĺima atu mam…ônu tuwaj. namakajzaaj sa, ¶aaj kakapańß ku uzip niza, pauzip tu patudu Ē~ ° tu simbuŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad, natajza ¶iniza mudadiw i r~…ĺaziw kakitizaan, masik…ôt tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, sinawar~…ĺtu, katukuńß i pad…ôkuan sa, mab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ tuwaj. siuzip ** a mińß ¶a. Ňčatu ¶a ¶aj uwak , uwak, mapur~…ĺuŇč kita ¶…ôr~…ĺip tu …ôpańß, busuk r~…ĺa~, busuk r~…ĺa~ musadadiw , masar~…ĺukjw , mapur~…ĺuŇč kita, apauzip mabur~…ĺaw tansuj mabur~…ĺańß tu kakajdińßan , kiptur~…ĺ kja idińß , matin…ôŇč tu ~ ¶iapaaj kaku ¶…ôr~…ĺip tu pańß, r~…ĺińßar~…ĺajaj , aka muwaŇči ¶ , u simpi Ē~ ° ku na ¶ir~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺa Ē~ ° makazat…ôŇč , kakajdińßan, ńßamin ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn , mabur~…ĺawtu , mur~…ĺijaw kaku ¶aaj kaku patańßtańß , ¶aaj kakapańß ku uzip muawaw tu taw, tajzatu kaku, mudadiw kaku mar~…ĺar~…ĺum mapawpaw , mur~…ĺ…ônu , aka kar~…ĺibud, sar~…ĺańßbar~…ĺ , maŇčadis a ¶a manamuńß i r~…ĺabiji , mapur~…ĺuŇč kita, sar~…ĺukjw kisu, miur~…ĺi ¶ kaku uwak, uwak, mapur~…ĺuŇč kita ¶…ôr~…ĺip tu …ôpańß, busuk r~…ĺa~, busuk r~…ĺa~ Ňčatu tusa uwak, uwak, mapur~…ĺuŇč kita ¶…ôr~…ĺip tu …ôpańß, busuk r~…ĺa~, busuk r~…ĺa~ musadadiw , masar~…ĺukjw, mapur~…ĺuŇč kita, apauzip mabur~…ĺaw tansuj mabur~…ĺańß tu kakajdińßan, kiptur~…ĺ kja idińß, matin…ôŇč tu ~ ¶iapaaj kaku ¶…ôr~…ĺip tu pańß, r~…ĺińßar~…ĺajaj, akamuwaŇči ¶, u simpi Ē~ ° ku na ¶ir~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺa Ē~ ° makazat…ôŇč, kakajdińßan, ńßamin ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn, mabur~…ĺawtu, mur~…ĺijaw kaku ¶aaj kaku patańßtańß, ¶aaj kakapańß ku uzip muawaw tu taw, tajzatu kaku, mudadiw kaku mar~…ĺar~…ĺum mapawpaw, mur~…ĺ…ônu, akakar~…ĺibud, sar~…ĺańßbar~…ĺ, maŇčadis a ¶a manamuńß i r~…ĺabiji, mapur~…ĺuŇč kita, sar~…ĺukjw kisu, miur~…ĺi ¶ kaku uwak, uwak, mapur~…ĺuŇč kita ¶…ôr~…ĺip tu …ôpańß, busuk r~…ĺa~, busuk r~…ĺa~
